title: Replace logo with uploaded retro book store image across all pages

requirements.text: Save the uploaded image 'Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_180351_0000-removebg-preview.png' as a static asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png' and use it as the logo image source in every location where a logo is currently displayed: Navigation (desktop and mobile Sheet menu), Footer, ProfileSetupModal, and BooksPage hero banner.

quotes: Replace the logo in each and every page a place of the app you placed, attachment provided.

acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded retro book store logo PNG is saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png.
Navigation component displays the new logo on both desktop header and mobile Sheet menu, replacing any previous logo.
Footer component displays the new logo, replacing any previous logo.
ProfileSetupModal displays the new logo, replacing any previous logo.
BooksPage displays the new logo wherever the previous logo appeared.
No instance of the old logo image remains visible anywhere in the app.
The favicon in frontend/index.html is updated to reference the new logo asset.

constraints: Do not alter any immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, ui components).
Use the exact uploaded image file — do not substitute a different image or generate a new one.
nonGoals: Resizing or cropping the uploaded logo image.
Modifying backend logic or data models.
